title: 53rd Fiddling Contest of Festival du Voyageur
excerpt: Join the fun and the thrill of competition on Sunday, February 25, 2024 at the  Relais du Voyageur at the Centre culturel franco-manitobain (CCFM) Salle Jean-Paul Aubry, 340 Provencher Blvd,...
bodyHtml:
Join the fun and the thrill of competition on Sunday, February 25, 2024 at the Relais du Voyageur at the Centre culturel franco-manitobain (CCFM) Salle Jean-Paul Aubry, 340 Provencher Blvd, Winnipeg, MB.

Registration begins at 10:30am.

Online pre-registration is available. Please follow this link for more information.
